jurisdictionDisplayName: City of Bastrop, TX (B3 Place Types)
note: WDLL items 51-52. Codified from the City of Bastrop B3 Code, April 2025, Section 6.5.003(A), with P-EC defaulting to P5 per Section 2.4.006(a); accessed 2026-07-23. P-2 and P-3 use the stated 25 ft undeveloped-lot build-to minimum. For developed P-2/P-3 lots, the Code instead requires the average front-yard setback of two lots on each side, plus or minus 5 ft; that contextual first-layer calculation is not modeled. P-4/P-5 and P-EC use the conservative larger value from their stated build-to ranges. The Code supplies no scalar side or rear setbacks and expresses building height in stories, so those served numeric fields are marked not_specified in provenance. P-1 has no stated scalar build-to or first-layer setback; its 0 ft field is explicitly not_specified, not a claimed entitlement. P-CS has no scalar standard in the B3 table and PDD is controlled by project-specific concept and development plans; both remain unmapped rather than borrowing a district.

front_ft.quote: Section 6.5.003(A) P1 column is blank for Build-to-Line and First Layer Setback; no scalar front setback is stated.

rear_ft.quote: Section 6.5.003(A) specifies lot occupation and front build-to/first-layer standards; it states no scalar side or rear setback.
